merits.name: Abhorrent Blood
merits.summary: other vampires cannot stomach your blood; anyone trying to drink from you must spend 2 Willpower per turn to continue; mortals and Thin-blood Alchemy unaffected

merits.name: Allies: Effectiveness
merits.summary: how capable your ally group is. ● weak mortal (likely useless in violence). ●● average mortal or tight-knit group of weak mortals (church group, NGO chapter). ●●● gifted mortal or dangerous average group (street gang, blue-collar union local). ●●●● deadly mortal, gifted mortal with supernatural power, or well-armed group (private security squad, Mafia bratva). Effectiveness + Reliability combined may not exceed 6.

merits.name: Allies: Reliability
merits.summary: how dependable your ally group is. ● appear about half the time. ●● appear within 1–10 hours (roll a die). ●●● appear as soon as possible. Effectiveness + Reliability combined may not exceed 6.

merits.name: Anarch Comrades
merits.summary: A coterie of Anarchs considers you their pet

merits.name: Apocryphal Texts
merits.summary: possess disputed writings that help related Intelligence rolls

merits.name: Archangel's Grace
merits.summary: swap Performance and Athletics for athletic artistry, fights, or dancing

merits.name: Armored
merits.summary: reinforced mobile haven resists damage and protects passengers better

merits.name: Bargainer
merits.summary: reduce Difficulty when assessing a deal or transaction

merits.name: Beautiful
merits.summary: +1 die in Social rolls

merits.name: Blood Empathy
merits.summary: sense your domitor's emotional/psychological state within 1 mile; know when they are in peril or require your presence; does not allow telepathic communication

merits.name: Bloodhound
merits.summary: smell resonance in mortal blood

merits.name: Bond Resistance
merits.summary: add dice to resist blood bonds

merits.name: Bonds of Fealty
merits.summary: requires Dominate. Your Dominate powers do not require eye contact when targeting someone blood bound to you. You still need to communicate your instructions, but need not be physically present.

merits.name: Bull-Slayer
merits.summary: reroll regular dice during extended tests as you adapt to a chosen target

merits.name: Business Establishment
merits.summary: your haven contains a money-making business with useful local access

merits.name: Camarilla Contact
merits.summary: A Camarilla recruiter promises you admittance, but treats you badly and asks you to do tasks

merits.name: Catenating Blood
merits.summary: You can create blood bonds and embrace new Vampires

merits.name: Cell
merits.summary: you can imprison people in your haven

merits.name: Check the Trunk
merits.summary: Get easy access to an armory or tools; none of the items can be more valuable than Resources 2

merits.name: City Secrets
merits.summary: hold a dangerous local secret that can protect or leverage you

merits.name: Cobbler
merits.summary: You can make or source masks for others

merits.name: Cold Dead Hunger
merits.summary: add dice to resist Hunger frenzy

merits.name: Consanguineous Influence
merits.summary: mental Disciplines are more effective on those of the same bloodline: +1 die against any clan member or direct ancestor/descendant, or +2 dice if only one or two generations removed. Not available to Caitiff or Duskborn.

merits.name: Consanguineous Sense
merits.summary: your Blood calls out to close relations. Instinctively recognize direct bloodline members within a few paces. Resolve + Awareness vs Difficulty 3 to confirm if a Kindred within ~3m shares your bloodline (but not their exact Generation distance). Not available to Caitiff or Duskborn.

merits.name: Contacts
merits.summary: mortals who provide information or valuable items

merits.name: Custodian of History
merits.summary: an elder confided their version of a lost age to you. Choose one subject (Book of Nod, First Inquisition, Constantinople, Revelations of the Dark Mother, Antiquity and Carthage, etc.): +1 die to all Skill tests pertaining to it.

merits.name: Dark Mother's Song
merits.summary: gain dice when recruiting others into Lilith worship through grief or pain

merits.name: Day Drinker
merits.summary: Walking in the sun doesn't damage you, but removes all your Vampiric abilities and halves your health

merits.name: Discipline Affinity
merits.summary: Pick a Discipline (lv1) that you can increase like a normal Vampire

merits.name: Drive-thru
merits.summary: once per session, raise hunt Difficulty to finish feeding within minutes

merits.name: Eat Food
merits.summary: can consume normal food

merits.name: Enduring Bond
merits.summary: your blood bonds last longer than normal. Complete and partial blood bonds only weaken every other month, not every month.

merits.name: Enduring Fame
merits.summary: lost Fame returns at the start of the next story

merits.name: Faith-Proof
merits.summary: too close to mortality for True Faith to affect you

merits.name: False Love
merits.summary: choose a Storyteller character as your obsession. When in their presence, treat Humanity as 1 higher (max 10) for Blush of Life, eating/drinking, and intercourse. Does not combine with other Humanity-treating-as-higher effects. If they die, gain 3 Stains but choose a new obsession next session.

merits.name: Fame
merits.summary: 1 - a select subculture loves you, 5 - you are well known and loved globally

merits.name: Famous Face
merits.summary: look like a celebrity; helps socially but makes you memorable

merits.name: Favored Blood
merits.summary: buy dots in any Discipline without tasting that Discipline's blood first

merits.name: Fire Resistant
merits.summary: convert a little fire aggravated damage during daysleep more efficiently

merits.name: Fixer
merits.summary: once per story, call in leverage from someone you procured secrets for

merits.name: Furcus
merits.summary: mystic crossing in your haven aids rituals or ceremonies performed there

merits.name: Gardener
merits.summary: lead a Bahari garden that acts as selective Herd and Influence

merits.name: Gematria
merits.summary: understand the Shalimite cipher well enough to encrypt and decrypt messages

merits.name: Go to Ground
merits.summary: add dice to evade pursuit with prepared escape routes and go bags

merits.name: Haven
merits.summary: secure homebase, 1 - apartment, 3 - big building

merits.name: Herd
merits.summary: group of mortals who let you feed, 1 - a couple of people, 5 - large group and you can freely pick desired resonances

merits.name: Hidden Armory
merits.summary: weapons and armor in your haven

merits.name: High-functioning addict
merits.summary: add a die to one category of pool (choose once) when the last person you fed from was on your drug

merits.name: Holy Ground
merits.summary: cult-significant haven site can call defenders once per story

merits.name: Influence
merits.summary: power over a mortal sphere (politics, media, finance…), 1 - minor sway, 5 - near-total control

merits.name: Influencer
merits.summary: temporarily leverage Fame like narrower Influence once per story

merits.name: Ingénue
merits.summary: look innocent, adding dice to deflect blame or suspicion

merits.name: Insidious Whispers
merits.summary: score criticals more easily when undermining a target's Conviction

merits.name: Inspired Artist
merits.summary: cult-themed art makes viewers more susceptible to cult social pressure

merits.name: Iron Gullet
merits.summary: able to feed on rancid blood

merits.name: Laboratory
merits.summary: equipped haven lab for Science, Technology, or alchemy work

merits.name: Ley Line Leech
merits.summary: after meaningful travel, wake the next night without a rising Rouse Check

merits.name: Library
merits.summary: research collection tied to one scholarly specialty per dot

merits.name: Lifelike
merits.summary: Your body appears fully human, with a beating heart and a working stomach

merits.name: Linguistics
merits.summary: fluently speak another language

merits.name: Location
merits.summary: prime haven spot that helps nearby hunting, politics, or security

merits.name: Low Appetite
merits.summary: when rising at Hunger 0 or 1, roll two dice on your Rouse Check and take the highest

merits.name: Lucid Dreamer
merits.summary: you dream and can recall them; once per session ask the ST for a clue from the previous night's memories or a story hint suitable for dream revelation

merits.name: Luck of the Devil
merits.summary: once per session, shift a misfortune onto someone nearby

merits.name: Luxury
merits.summary: +2 Dice on Social rolls in your haven

merits.name: Machine Shop
merits.summary: tools and machinery for building, repairing, or dismantling equipment

merits.name: Major Boon
merits.summary: a serious favor owed by another vampire, scaled by their status

merits.name: Mark of Caine
merits.summary: +2 dice to intimidate or cow vampires who believe in the myth of Caine; diablerists cannot add Blood Potency vs you and failure on their roll results in a bestial failure

merits.name: Mask
merits.summary: fake identity with fake documents, lv2 can pass background checks

merits.name: Mawla
merits.summary: kindred mentor to advise or help you

merits.name: Memories of the Fallen
merits.summary: Ashe visions make some Blood Alchemy rolls critically stronger

merits.name: Minor Boon
merits.summary: a tracked favor owed by another vampire, scaled by their status

merits.name: Mobile
merits.summary: your haven is a vehicle, from a small sunproof ride to a large transport

merits.name: Mockingbird
merits.summary: for one night after drinking 1 Hunger die of blood from a vampire, borrow one of their Discipline powers (up to your highest Discipline level); mimic donor's bane at their severity during this time; once per night

merits.name: Mortality's Mien
merits.summary: your aura appears mortal rather than vampiric; +2 dice to any attempt to appear mortal

merits.name: Mystic of the Void
merits.summary: count selected Oblivion powers as known for ceremony prerequisites

merits.name: Nuit Mode
merits.summary: at low Blood Potency, keep chosen body modifications after rest

merits.name: Object of Power
merits.summary: a rare and powerful item. ● set of uncommonly lucky dice: reroll one non-Hunger die once per story. ●● Grimoire: +1 die to all Level 1 Ritual tests. ●●● golden eye amulet: free Premonition warning once per session when someone is about to harm you.

merits.name: Pack Diablerie
merits.summary: claim the main benefit when sharing diablerie and gain a small echo if aiding

merits.name: Penitence
merits.summary: self-scourging converts superficial Health damage into Willpower healing

merits.name: Persistent Blush
merits.summary: one Blush of Life activation lasts a week

merits.name: Postern
merits.summary: hidden exit or escape route from your haven

merits.name: Remarkable Feature
merits.summary: striking feature helps first impressions but hinders disguises

merits.name: Resources
merits.summary: wealth & income, 1 - you can afford basics, 5 - you can afford anything money can buy

merits.name: Retainer
merits.summary: loyal servant. ● weak mortal (child, criminal lowlife, or horror nerd). ●● average mortal or ghoul with no Advantages (family servant, human lover, dominated thrall). ●●● gifted mortal or ghoul with supernatural abilities, competent enough to act independently.

merits.name: Scene Kid
merits.summary: embody a subculture's style, helping social rolls with those in the know

merits.name: Security System
merits.summary: better alarms and defenses against unwanted entry

merits.name: Semblance of the Methuselah
merits.summary: resemble an ancient ancestor, helping with those who respect or fear them

merits.name: Short Bond
merits.summary: blood bonds on you fade faster than normal

merits.name: Shrine
merits.summary: haven shrine helps gather or prepare ritual and ceremony ingredients

merits.name: Side Hustler
merits.summary: once per session, pull a small item, lead, or access from your network

merits.name: Sins of the Fathers
merits.summary: after committing diablerie on a direct ancestor or descendant, you show no telltale signs. Powers like Scry the Soul or A Taste for Blood do not detect the crime. ●●●: extends to any member of your own clan. Caitiff and Duskborn cannot take the 3-dot version.

merits.name: Smugglers Stash
merits.summary: hidden compartment in a mobile haven for cargo or daysleep

merits.name: Soothed Beast
merits.summary: choose a Storyteller character as your obsession. Once per session when in their presence, ignore one Bestial Failure or Messy Critical. If they die, gain 3 Stains but choose a new obsession at the start of the next session.

merits.name: Spare Plates
merits.summary: swap mobile haven identifiers quickly to evade most ordinary searches

merits.name: Status
merits.summary: positive reputation within a faction

merits.name: Streamer
merits.summary: once per story, mobilize online followers for a simple nonviolent action

merits.name: Stunning
merits.summary: +2 dice in Social rolls

merits.name: Sun-Scarred
merits.summary: first turn of sunlight: no Health damage, 1 Aggravated Willpower damage, auto-succeed terror frenzy roll; remainder of scene: all sun Health damage becomes Superficial

merits.name: Surgery
merits.summary: medical room that helps Medicine tests in your haven

merits.name: Swift Feeder
merits.summary: slake 1 Hunger in one turn including licking the wound closed; once per scene

merits.name: Tempered Will
merits.summary: sense Dominate or Presence and resist them better once per session

merits.name: Thin-blood Alchemist
merits.summary: Gain one dot and one formula in Thin-blood Alchemy

merits.name: Traveling Preacher
merits.summary: mapped safe routes reduce notice from hunters while traveling

merits.name: Unbondable
merits.summary: you cannot be blood bound

merits.name: Uncle Fangs
merits.summary: easy access to a local coterie of 3–5 thin-bloods; treat as Allies (undead); they often know street events early and may provide Alchemical concoctions

merits.name: Unholy Will
merits.summary: resist True Faith effects better and reduce holy damage

merits.name: Unseemly Aura
merits.summary: your aura appears vampiric rather than mortal; may cause others to overestimate you

merits.name: Untouchable
merits.summary: once per story, avoid official punishment for a severe offense

merits.name: Up All Night
merits.summary: for Blush of Life, eating/drinking, and sexual intercourse, treat Humanity as 1 higher (●●) or 2 higher (●●●●). Cannot combine with other Humanity-treating-as-higher effects. Nosferatu cannot select; Hecata can only select at 2 dots.

merits.name: Vampiric Resilience
merits.summary: Suffer only superficial damage from most sources, like a normal Vampire

merits.name: Vessel Recognition
merits.summary: smell whether a mortal has recently been fed on

merits.name: Vigilant
merits.summary: always know when you are watched unless supernatural concealment hides it

merits.name: Warding
merits.summary: mystic protection against scrying or supernatural intrusion

merits.name: Watchmen
merits.summary: mortal security guards

merits.name: Zealotry
merits.summary: turn Conviction-aligned normal successes into messy criticals

merits.name: Zeroed
merits.summary: all your real records are purged, you officially don't exist

flaws.name: Addiction
flaws.summary: -1 die on all pools if the last person you fed from wasn't on your drug

flaws.name: Adversary
flaws.summary: Kindred who opposes you, rated by their Status or relevant Trait. ● Neonate. ●● Ancilla. ●●● Elder. ●●●● Primogen or Anarch Revolutionary Council member. ●●●●● Prince or Baron.

flaws.name: Archaic
flaws.summary: Can't use computers, technology skill stuck at 0

flaws.name: Ashe Addiction
flaws.summary: failed Ashe-related alchemy leaves you distracted for the session

flaws.name: Baby Teeth
flaws.summary: Your teeth are useless for feeding, you need to cut your victims

flaws.name: Baneful Blood
flaws.summary: experience your first domitor's clan bane at 1 level per dot; domitor must be Lasombra, Malkavian, Ministry, Nosferatu, Ravnos, Salubri, or Toreador; bane does not change if domitor changes

flaws.name: Banned From...
flaws.summary: barred from a Kindred-ruled city. ● small city (Portland, Salzburg). ●● mid-sized city (Venice, Sacramento). ●●● large city (Paris, Tokyo, Cairo). Getting in anyway causes serious trouble.

flaws.name: Beacon of Profanity
flaws.summary: mortals with even faint True Faith can sense your profane presence

flaws.name: Befouling Vitae
flaws.summary: any mortal you Embrace or kill by feeding returns as a wight within a few nights; the local Prince or Baron will hear about it

flaws.name: Bestial Temper
flaws.summary: Be weak to frenzy like a normal vampire

flaws.name: Blatant Diablerist
flaws.summary: telltale signs of diablerie are always noticeable to those who can sense it. Powers such as Scry the Soul or A Taste for Blood always reveal diablerie, even on an otherwise failed test. Can only be taken at creation if the character has a history of diablerie.

flaws.name: Bond Junkie
flaws.summary: lose one die on all actions that go against your blood bond

flaws.name: Bondslave
flaws.summary: blood bonds on you are created on the first drink

flaws.name: Branded by the Camarilla
flaws.summary: The Camarilla have their eyes peeled on you

flaws.name: Clan Curse
flaws.summary: Pick a Clan Curse (severity 1)

flaws.name: Compromised
flaws.summary: your haven is on a watchlist

flaws.name: Corpse Flesh
flaws.summary: your body cannot benefit from Blush of Life

flaws.name: Creepy
flaws.summary: your haven looks like the den of a serial killer, neighbors might phone in a tip to the police

flaws.name: Crisis of Faith
flaws.summary: bestial failures also damage your Willpower

flaws.name: Crone's Curse
flaws.summary: the Blood aged you rapidly; appear at least a decade older than you are and have one fewer Health box

flaws.name: Cursed Object
flaws.summary: something you own wants you dead. Once per session at a time determined by the Storyteller, you must reroll a successful test, risking failure instead.

flaws.name: Dark Secret
flaws.summary: You have a dark secret, like owing a debt to bad people or having escaped a blood hunt for masquerade breaching in another city

flaws.name: Dead Flesh
flaws.summary: Your flesh slowly rots, -1 to social tests with Mortals

flaws.name: Debt Peon
flaws.summary: owe boons to a high-Status vampire who never considers them settled; two-dice penalty to Social combat against you in front of other Kindred; refusal adds the Shunned flaw and risks a Blood Hunt

flaws.name: Despised
flaws.summary: a local group or region actively works against you

flaws.name: Destitute
flaws.summary: poor & no income

flaws.name: Disease Vector
flaws.summary: sick vessels always infect you and your next feeding victim

flaws.name: Disliked
flaws.summary: lose a die socially with most local groups

flaws.name: Distressing Fangs
flaws.summary: the Blood gave you strange, unsettling teeth; -1 die to Social pools with mortals

flaws.name: Empty
flaws.summary: your hollowness unsettles outsiders and penalizes social rolls

flaws.name: Enemy
flaws.summary: mortal group working against you, rated two dots below their Effectiveness. ● enemy at Effectiveness ●●● (gifted mortal or dangerous group). ●● enemy at Effectiveness ●●●● (deadly mortal, well-armed group). Number of enemy groups equals number of player characters.

flaws.name: Excommunicated
flaws.summary: your former cult shuns you or actively works toward your ruin

flaws.name: Failed Initiate
flaws.summary: a cult minder scrutinizes and interrupts you after a failed step

flaws.name: Faithless
flaws.summary: you fake belief and suffer when acting for the cult or advancing within it

flaws.name: False Alarms
flaws.summary: failed Awareness rolls become total failures under constant paranoia

flaws.name: Farmer
flaws.summary: feeding on non-animal blood costs you 2 willpower

flaws.name: Folkloric Bane
flaws.summary: specific items damage you (eg. silver, garlic)

flaws.name: Folkloric Block
flaws.summary: must spend willpower to move past specific block (eg. running water, door uninvited)

flaws.name: Grief Phobia
flaws.summary: a lost Touchstone left you with a permanent phobia for something that reminds you of them. -1 die to all tests made in the presence of your phobic stimulus. Can be taken once per lost Touchstone.

flaws.name: Groveling Worm
flaws.summary: must scourge yourself each session or suffer aggravated Willpower damage

flaws.name: Haunted
flaws.summary: ghostly presence in your haven

flaws.name: Heliophobia
flaws.summary: fear sunlight as though a full vampire; susceptible to terror frenzy from sunlight

flaws.name: Hopeless Addiction
flaws.summary: -2 dice on all pools if the last person you fed from wasn't on your drug

flaws.name: Horrible Scars of Penitence
flaws.summary: faith scars make you socially repulsive outside your cult

flaws.name: Illiterate
flaws.summary: Can't read or write, Academics and Science capped at 1

flaws.name: Infamy
flaws.summary: 1 - a select subculture despises you, 5 - you are well known and hated globally

flaws.name: Ingrained Discipline
flaws.summary: take a Discipline-specific drawback to unlock extra purchasable powers in that Discipline

flaws.name: Inherited Bane
flaws.summary: you suffer another clan's bane in addition to your own (e.g., Tremere may take the Salubri clan bane).

flaws.name: Knowledge Hungry
flaws.summary: must resist pursuing study of a chosen subject when new sources appear

flaws.name: Known Blankbody
flaws.summary: Certain governments / organizations know you're a vampire

flaws.name: Known Corpse
flaws.summary: others know you're dead

flaws.name: Land Locked
flaws.summary: air or sea travel provokes fear frenzy from your Beast

flaws.name: Life Debt
flaws.summary: you owe an overwhelming debt to another vampire

flaws.name: Liquidator
flaws.summary: thin-bloods shun and avoid you; -2 dice to Social skill pools against thin-bloods except Intimidation

flaws.name: Living in the Past
flaws.summary: you have outdated views & convictions

flaws.name: Long Bond
flaws.summary: blood bonds on you take longer to wane

flaws.name: Major Debt
flaws.summary: you owe a dangerous favor to another vampire

flaws.name: Methusela's Thirst
flaws.summary: can't fully satiate on mortal blood

flaws.name: Minor Debt
flaws.summary: you owe a smaller boon to another vampire

flaws.name: Mortal Frailty
flaws.summary: Cannot rouse your blood to heal yourself

flaws.name: Mortal Pretender
flaws.summary: Masquerade enforcers distrust your attempt to live too much like a mortal

flaws.name: Muddled Blood
flaws.summary: must drink blood of someone with a Discipline to buy dots in it, even if you already possess it

flaws.name: Night Terrors
flaws.summary: once per session night terrors onset and you take a -1 die penalty to all actions for the rest of the scene

flaws.name: No Haven
flaws.summary: you don't have a home

flaws.name: Obvious Predator
flaws.summary: mortals are scared of you, can't keep Herd

flaws.name: Old Tricks
flaws.summary: you've never mastered the modern age: all your Skill specialties must be Archaic specialties.

flaws.name: On the Rails
flaws.summary: mobile haven follows fixed routes or destinations outside your full control

flaws.name: Organovore
flaws.summary: your hunger demands human flesh and organs

flaws.name: Outdated Preference
flaws.summary: your preferred vessel has become nearly impossible to find (castrati, quaalude addicts, footmen, etc). You must force mortals to fit your preference, or always spend 1 Willpower to feed.

flaws.name: Plague Bearer
flaws.summary: still susceptible to mortal illness; roll a die per Hunger slaked when feeding — on a 1 you catch something (ST determines effect); only slaking to Hunger 0 cures you; can infect those you feed on

flaws.name: Plaguebringer
flaws.summary: a persistent disease lives in your vitae and spreads through your bite

flaws.name: Prestation Debts
flaws.summary: owe two minor boons to a more influential Kindred

flaws.name: Prey Exclusion
flaws.summary: can't feed on certain types of people

flaws.name: Repulsive
flaws.summary: -2 dice in Social rolls

flaws.name: Resistant Blush
flaws.summary: roll twice and keep the worse result when using Blush of Life

flaws.name: Resonance Mimic
flaws.summary: victims' memories and personalities intrude after feeding

flaws.name: Resonance Sensitivity
flaws.summary: one intense resonance triggers a lingering custom Compulsion after feeding

flaws.name: Risk-Taker
flaws.summary: new risky temptations distract you until indulged or the scene ends

flaws.name: Schism
flaws.summary: your lineage or history makes your cult suspicious of your loyalty

flaws.name: Secret Master
flaws.summary: requires Mawla 1+. Your Mawla has a hold over you and once per story requires a minor secret task. Failure escalates next story. Continued failure forfeits the flaw, replaced by 2+ dots of other flaws.

flaws.name: Shameful Childe
flaws.summary: you Embraced someone and abandoned them. They're out there somewhere, and sooner or later they'll come back to confront you.

flaws.name: Shared
flaws.summary: other Kindred have access to or authority over your haven

flaws.name: Shunned
flaws.summary: despised by a faction

flaws.name: Shunned by the Anarchs
flaws.summary: Anarchs shun you

flaws.name: Sloppy Drinker
flaws.summary: make Dex + Medicine vs difficulty = Hunger slaked after feeding to close wound marks; on failure the wound is too ragged, risking the Masquerade

flaws.name: Sloppy Feeder
flaws.summary: your feeding leaves a recognizable pattern useful to authorities or hunters

flaws.name: Stake Bait
flaws.summary: Final Death when staked

flaws.name: Stalkers
flaws.summary: unwanted mortal followers

flaws.name: Starving Decay
flaws.summary: at Hunger 3+, decay harms physical and mortal social tests

flaws.name: Stench
flaws.summary: foul odor hurts seduction and hiding from those who can smell

flaws.name: Stigmata
flaws.summary: bleed from your hands, feet and forehead when at Hunger 4

flaws.name: Sun-Faded
flaws.summary: cannot use Disciplines or Thin-blood Alchemy in sunlight; indoors by day suffer -2 dice penalty as long as no sunlight reaches you

flaws.name: Supernatural Tell
flaws.summary: other supernatural entities can sense your presence; -2 dice from Stealth pools against supernatural opponents including other vampires

flaws.name: Suspect
flaws.summary: bad reputation within a faction, -2 on Social tests with them

flaws.name: Temperamental
flaws.summary: mobile haven breaks down at the worst time after failed Drive tests

flaws.name: Touchstone Embraced by Your Enemies
flaws.summary: a former Touchstone was Embraced and now runs with your enemies. A single neonate Adversary with allies; confronting them risks Stains.

flaws.name: Transparent
flaws.summary: bad liar; lose dice with Subterfuge and cannot improve it

flaws.name: Twice-Cursed
flaws.summary: suffer your clan's variant Bane in addition to its normal Bane

flaws.name: Twilight Presence
flaws.summary: mortals and Kindred are uncomfortable around you; -1 die from Social pools with everyone except other thin-bloods

flaws.name: Two Masters
flaws.summary: you can be Blood Bound to two individuals simultaneously. May cause complications if you drink Kindred blood recreationally.

flaws.name: Ugly
flaws.summary: -1 die in Social rolls

flaws.name: Unblinking Visage
flaws.summary: your dead body has forgotten blinking, breathing, and automatic reflexes. Count Humanity as two levels lower (minimum zero) for Blush of Life and similar life-mimicking activities.

flaws.name: Unending Hunger
flaws.summary: your Beast always hungers for more; slake 1 fewer Hunger than other thin-bloods per scene

flaws.name: Vegan
flaws.summary: feed only from animals; human blood costs Willpower

flaws.name: Vein Tapper
flaws.summary: cannot feed from mortals while being observed

flaws.name: Vitae Dependency
flaws.summary: Need to drink Vampire vitae once a week to use Disciplines

flaws.name: Walking Omen
flaws.summary: scrying, premonitions, and fortune-telling in your domain regularly point to you as a source of disaster; at least one serious altercation per story as oracles or hunters seek you out

flaws.name: Weak-Willed
flaws.summary: struggle to resist a leader's influence and cannot actively resist mental sway

flaws.name: Word-Scarred
flaws.summary: your body is covered in ancient vampiric lore text; the major occult force in the chronicle seeks to imprison, flense, or otherwise neutralize you; others who read the full text learn a terrible Gehenna secret

flaws.name: Yearning
flaws.summary: working against a lost master's goals costs Willpower
